nodes.name: checklist-template.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit checklist template providing a numbered task-checklist scaffold that the /speckit-checklist command fills in with feature-specific items derived from spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md.

nodes.name: constitution-template.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit constitution template defining placeholder sections for core project principles, governance rules, and amendment policies that the /speckit-constitution command instantiates for a specific project.

nodes.name: plan-template.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit implementation plan template providing structure for technical context, constitution checks, project directory layout, and complexity tracking that the /speckit-plan command populates for a feature branch.

nodes.name: spec-template.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit feature specification template with prioritized user story structure, BDD acceptance scenarios, functional requirements, key entities, success criteria, and assumptions that the /speckit-specify command instantiates.

nodes.name: tasks-template.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit task list template organizing implementation work into phased, user-story-aligned tasks with parallel execution markers, dependency ordering, and incremental delivery checkpoints that the /speckit-tasks command populates.
